notes: Fix after CC7.5.2: loader rollback alone did not change comments behavior because public/app-onepass.js still forced landing when no explicit client identity was detected.
public/app-onepass.js now tries /api/adminkit/comment-open-state first and renders discussion when backend resolves meta/postSnapshot.
Keeps CC7.5.2 loader chain: no adminkit-archive-lite-layer and no adminkit-clean-menu-core.
Keeps routes/commentOpenState.js, services/postMetaService.js and services/maxApi.js native open_app payload path.
No external code.run /app comments button, no overlay, no floating hints, no visual redesign.
Acceptance priority: comments under old and new posts open discussion screen and show post snapshot; plain /start without post identity still shows landing.
